category_sources: source_facts.description says 3D Voronoi cell software library; official Voro++ homepage describes a library for three-dimensional Voronoi tessellation computations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is voro++; official math.lbl.gov homepage and documentation title use Voro++.
docs_sources: Official math.lbl.gov Voro++ documentation page links command-line reference, customized output reference, and C++ class reference manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Voro++ download page states the development version is hosted on code@LBL with anonymous Subversion checkout at this URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Voro++ homepage/documentation describe a C++ Voronoi library with a command-line utility.
